name_en: chane1 24k kelly Kelly Autumn/Winter Runway Hit
name_cn:
chane1 24k kelly Kelly Autumn/Winter Runway Hit
Imported original factory leather
Feels like the wallet can't hold it. Keyy as design inspiration.
Really elegant yet gentle. The vintage style also has a strong French retro feel. Really love it!
Can be carried by hand or crossbody, fits a phone.
Color: Black, Gold chain
Model: AS4416
Size: 13*19*7cm
